nodes.label: VENLAX Logo (Primary)
nodes.description: Primary VENLAX Sports logo on white background: horizontal wordmark with VEN in black, LAX in teal/emerald, SPORTS in smaller caps. Three sport dots (green/blue/orange) inline. Used as primary brand asset.

nodes.label: VENLAX Logo (Transparent)
nodes.description: VENLAX Sports logo on transparent background; same wordmark as primary but PNG-transparent for use on colored backgrounds. Light variant with white text for dark surfaces.

nodes.label: Logo Icon (Favicon)
nodes.description: Compact square icon version of VENLAX brand mark: simplified geometric VX letterform or sport dots pattern. Used as favicon and PWA icon at 192px and 512px sizes.

nodes.label: Logo Shield Badge
nodes.description: VENLAX shield/crest badge variant: hexagonal or shield shape containing VX monogram or full wordmark. Dark background with teal/lime accents. Sport crest aesthetic for merchandise and social media profile.

nodes.label: Logo PNG (Public)
nodes.description: General-purpose logo PNG in public directory; serves as OG image fallback and meta tag image reference. Standard dimensions for social sharing previews.

nodes.label: Logo PNG (Src Assets)
nodes.description: Logo PNG in src/assets directory for webpack/craco bundling; imported directly in React components as a module. Same visual as public/logo.png but processed through asset pipeline.

hyperedges.label: VENLAX Sports Complete Brand Identity System
hyperedges.description: Six logo asset files representing the complete brand identity: wordmark (dark+transparent), shield badge, icon/favicon, and general-purpose PNG — covering all usage contexts from web favicon to social sharing to component imports
